CustomField.description: Device identifier (DI), a mandatory, fixed portion of a UDI that identifies the labeler and the specific version or model of a device. Also known as GTIN
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Device identifier (DI), a mandatory, fixed portion of a UDI that identifies the labeler and the specific version or model of a device. Also known as GTIN
CustomField.label: UDI Number
